summary: W869 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while composing W850 exact-input selected-cochain data with the W868 stable-ExactAt route. From W850 inputs, W869 checks direct bounded left calculus through W847/W868 and obtains the bounded derived infinity-category package through W847/W868. Product success remains false because the W736 comparison isomorphism input, concrete W735 exact-input data, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W869 replaces the W868 W847 selected-cochain boundary with W850 exact-input selected-cochain inputs, but still requires the W736 comparison isomorphism and concrete W735 exact-input branch.

Concrete W850 data still includes a universal IsIso proof for every MetrizableLCA left-right homology comparison and one W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact-input branch; those fields are not yet fully instantiated.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block the W850 inputs now isolated by W869: the universal W736 comparison-isomorphism input and one concrete W735 exact-input branch.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
